description_long: This object appears to be a large, rectangular block with a white, textured surface resembling foam or plaster, partially wrapped in brown paper. Embedded in the top surface is a rectangular plaque or label with printed text and a red seal, suggesting it may be a ceremonial or commemorative item. The overall form is elongated and wedge-like, with one end slightly tapered and the other more squared off. The surface texture is rough and uneven, with visible indentations and a matte finish. There are no visible metallic or sharp edges, and the object lacks a distinct handle or blade geometry typical of functional knives or swords. The object appears solid and dense, with no visible openings or separable parts.
description: A large, wedge-shaped block with a rough white surface, partially wrapped in brown paper and featuring a rectangular plaque with text and a red seal on top.
description_view_0: The block is seen from an angled top view, showing the white textured surface, brown paper edges, and the rectangular plaque with text and a red seal.
description_view_1: A low side view reveals the thinness of the object and the layered appearance of the brown paper wrapping along the edge.
description_view_2: Another angled top view, similar to view 0, but from the opposite side, again highlighting the white surface and embedded plaque.
description_view_3: A direct top-down view clearly displays the rectangular plaque with text and the rough, uneven white surface surrounding it.
attribute_handle_design: no distinct handle, block form, partially wrapped in brown paper
attribute_ornamentation: rectangular plaque with printed text and red seal
